task_description: Modify the MedicationReminderAlert component to show a pop-up section with Yes/No radio buttons asking if the user took the medicine. After confirming, close the alert and save the medicine intake to history.

verification.summary: bun run build succeeds. bun run lint passes with zero errors. No test framework installed so test_quality is skipped. No Dockerfile in project so docker_build is skipped. Semantic review v2 approved the changes.
